rule: Final output is not enough. Each material process step must carry reason, scope, evidence, validation status, and rollback pointer.

steps.name: Mission Contract
steps.reason: Bind objective, acceptance criteria, risk class, and claim boundary before work begins.
steps.publicPrivateBoundary: public-safe commitment only; private intelligence stays out of the public artifact

steps.name: Source Pass
steps.reason: Separate primary, secondary, derived, and uncertain sources before claims are accepted.
steps.publicPrivateBoundary: public-safe commitment only; private intelligence stays out of the public artifact

steps.name: Tool Scope
steps.reason: Record what tools were allowed, blocked, used, and why.
steps.publicPrivateBoundary: public-safe commitment only; private intelligence stays out of the public artifact

steps.name: Claim Lineage
steps.reason: Tie each material claim to evidence, process step, contradiction status, and uncertainty.
steps.publicPrivateBoundary: public-safe commitment only; private intelligence stays out of the public artifact

steps.name: Contradiction Pass
steps.reason: Prevent unresolved counterevidence from becoming institutional default.
steps.publicPrivateBoundary: public-safe commitment only; private intelligence stays out of the public artifact

steps.name: Process Validator
steps.reason: Validate process integrity, not just final wording.
steps.publicPrivateBoundary: public-safe commitment only; private intelligence stays out of the public artifact

steps.name: Risk Ledger
steps.reason: Surface remaining risk, uncertainty, reversibility, and human authority boundary.
steps.publicPrivateBoundary: public-safe commitment only; private intelligence stays out of the public artifact

steps.name: Receipt Pointer
steps.reason: Emit a public-safe receipt pointer without exposing private workpapers.
steps.publicPrivateBoundary: public-safe commitment only; private intelligence stays out of the public artifact
